news_items.title: Meta to Axe End-to-End Encryption for Instagram Messaging
news_items.summary: Meta plans to remove end-to-end encrypted messaging from Instagram DMs, citing low user adoption rates as the primary reason for this controversial decision.

news_items.title: iPhone Fold Rumors Heat Up with iPad-Style Interface Details
news_items.summary: New reports suggest Apple's foldable iPhone will feature a wider, iPad-style interface but will only support Touch ID due to design constraints with Face ID sensors.

news_items.title: AMD Pushes New Category of PCs: The Agent Computer
news_items.summary: AMD is pioneering a new class of AI-optimized PCs designed for local AI model execution, positioning to compete with Nvidia's DGX Spark in the professional computing market.

news_items.title: Adobe Settles Hidden Fees Lawsuit with $75M Free Service Promise
news_items.summary: Adobe agrees to provide $75 million worth of free services to settle a 2024 lawsuit over surprise fee tactics that affected numerous customers.

news_items.title: Amazon Hikes Prime Video Ultra Price, Removes 4K from Lower Tier
news_items.summary: Amazon increases ad-free Prime Video Ultra price by $2/month while stripping 4K video support from the ad-supported plan, affecting streaming quality options.

news_items.title: Google Maps Gets Major AI Upgrade with 'Ask Maps' Feature
news_items.summary: Google integrates Gemini AI into Maps, enabling conversational queries and 3D Immersive Navigation to show buildings and landmarks in enhanced detail.

news_items.title: FBI Seeks Victims Info After Steam Game Malware Distribution
news_items.summary: The FBI publishes a rare alert seeking victim information related to hackers exploiting Valve's Steam platform to distribute malware through indie games.

news_items.title: US Government Revokes Controversial AI Hardware Export Rule
news_items.summary: The US government revokes a controversial AI hardware export regulation that would have mandated investments from foreign companies, providing relief for AMD and Nvidia.

news_items.title: Chip Material Prices Double Amid Middle East Conflict
news_items.summary: Prices for key chipmaking metals have doubled as Middle East conflict compounds existing supply constraints, with gallium prices climbing sharply.

news_items.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT Gets Sora Video Generation Features
news_items.summary: OpenAI plans to integrate Sora's advanced video generation capabilities into ChatGPT, expanding the AI assistant's multimedia creation abilities.
